TermsOfUse1.title: Terms of Use
TermsOfUse1.intro: As per rules of using Mobile App of Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology, they must be applied to all users and visitors. The Mobile App usage may be stopped, and /or prevented, and /or ended in case of any violated rules and conditions of usage.
TermsOfUse1.warning: Users shall not be permitted to violate or attempt to violate the applicable procedures and regulations for protecting the Mobile App including but not limited to the following:

points.1: Accessing details that are not intended to be provided to this user or logging into a server or an account that the user is not authorized to access. Attempting to conduct any test or survey for finding weakness of any system or network of Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology or violating applicable procedures or documenting them without an official permit from Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology.
points.2: Attempting to interfere in the provided service on the part of any user, host or network including but not limited to placing a virus on the Mobile App, increasing load to or immersing it, sending commercial messages to it or avalanching it with electronic messages or even destroying it.
points.3: Sending unwanted electronic messages to the Mobile App including commercials and/or advertisements on services or products of falsifying and dispatch control protocol package address/internet protocol or any part of the address details in any electronic messages of sending news messages.
points.4: Using Mobile App of Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology by any means for sending an e-mail, anything of it or on its behalf, by referring to it, or assuming the identity of its name involving offense or libel of Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology, Mobile App or any person whomsoever, announcing any untrue news or information and ascribing it to Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology unrightfully.
points.5: Violating rules of usage, system or network shall expose the involved person to civil and criminal liability. Cases of such violations shall be investigated and the person involved shall be legally prosecuted.

Page.Title: Open Data
Page.Description: MOIAT open data is available free to use, reuse, distribute or share with others without restrictions, the open data available on this page is considered open data, which means information that is disclosed and published proactively, and MOIAT provides it to everyone via the Internet without restrictions or preventing to access.

OpenDataObj.Description: The Ministry welcomes all inquiries, suggestions, and complaints, which will be handled professionally with the utmost care and transparency. Please fill out the form below to obtain more required information.
OpenDataObj.Subject: Subject
OpenDataObj.MapDataDesc: This page contains information about registered factories.

OpenDataPolicy.PageTitle: Open Data Policy of the Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology
OpenDataPolicy.PageIntro: The Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT) is committed to fostering transparency, innovation, and sustainable development through the responsible sharing of open data. This Open Data Policy outlines MoIAT’s commitment to providing high-quality, accessible, and reusable data to the public, in alignment with the UAE’s e-government policies and the Federal Open Data Guidelines issued by the Telecommunications and Digital Government Regulatory Authority (TDRA).
OpenDataPolicy.Point1: Data will be published in machine-readable formats (e.g., CSV, XLS, XML) for easy access and usability.
OpenDataPolicy.Point2: Data will be accessible to all users without registration or other barriers.
OpenDataPolicy.Point3: Datasets will be available for bulk download to facilitate large-scale analysis.
OpenDataPolicy.Point4: Data will be available in widely supported formats like CSV, XLS, and XML. No special software is required to access the data.
OpenDataPolicy.Right1: Data can be reused, modified, and redistributed by any individual, entity, or government body, subject to the terms of the UAE Federal Open Data License.
OpenDataPolicy.Right2: Data may be used for commercial purposes, provided the conditions of the UAE Federal Open Data License are met, including proper attribution and non-misrepresentation.
OpenDataPolicy.ReusePoint1: Copy, reproduce and communicate to the public the Information in any format
OpenDataPolicy.ReusePoint2: Exploit the Information for both commercial and non-commercial purposes
OpenDataPolicy.ExceptionDescription: The License does not permit the use of any images (including logos, graphics, or photographs) which appear in a Database, nor any trademarks associated with a Database or with the Open Data Platform.
OpenDataPolicy.ConditionTitle: You must comply with the following terms
OpenDataPolicy.ConditionDescription: Users must comply with the terms of the UAE Federal Open Data License, including attribution and non-misrepresentation requirements. Improper use of the data, such as unlawful or misleading actions, will result in the withdrawal of the rights granted by this license.
OpenDataPolicy.MisuseDescription: Data must not be used for illegal, discriminatory, or harmful purposes, or in ways that conflict with UAE laws and values.
OpenDataPolicy.FeedbackTitle: Did you find this content useful?
OpenDataPolicy.FeedbackDesc: You can help us improve by providing your feedback about your experience.

ConformityAffairs.label: Conformity Affairs
ConformityAffairs.description: Services include all products subject to and not subject to technical regulations, UAE national marks, and labels, licensing using the "Made in the Emirates" mark, and product status.

EmiratesNationalAccreditationSystem.label: Emirates National Accreditation System (ENAS)
EmiratesNationalAccreditationSystem.description: The provision of registration, accreditation and designation services for measuring instruments and halal certification bodies.

GeneralInquiries.label: General Inquiries
GeneralInquiries.description: For any general inquiries (e.g., human resource, financial, ministry requirements, administrative services, etc.)

NationalInCountryValueProgram.label: National In-Country Value (ICV) Program
NationalInCountryValueProgram.description: One of the UAE’s Projects of the 50, this program aims to support economic growth by redirecting government procurement and that of leading national enterprises to local economy.

IndustrialServices.label: Industrial Services
IndustrialServices.description: Includes customs exemptions, the issuance of production licenses and preliminary approval certificates.

IndustrialRegistry.label: Industrial Registry
IndustrialRegistry.description: For inquiries related to documenting and updating industry data on the industrial registry in accordance with the Industrial Law 25/2022 and its executive regulations 79/2023.

MakeItInTheEmirates.label: Make it in the Emirates
MakeItInTheEmirates.description: An open invitation to manufacturers, investors, innovators, and entrepreneurs to establish their businesses in the UAE and leverage the UAE’s value proposition. This includes a platform to grow their business and enhance the competitiveness of their products in local and international markets.

MediaInquiries.label: Media Inquiries
MediaInquiries.description: Dedicated to receiving media inquiries and preparing responses for the ministry’s spokespeople.

NationalConformityMarks.label: National Conformity Marks
NationalConformityMarks.description: The provision of conformity services, including conformity marks and licenses that confirm companies and products meet the highest standards (renewable every three years).

IECEmiratesNationalCommittee.label: IEC Emirates National Committee (AENC)
IECEmiratesNationalCommittee.description: The IEC Emirates National Committee (AENC) is a supervisory committee under the Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT) and an affiliate of the International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC).

ContactMinisterPage.ContactMinisterSubtitle: All inquiries / feedback will be processed within 5 working days
